title: Add Playwright install button and status display to frontend setup page
goal: 프론트엔드 setup 페이지에 Playwright 설치 상태 표시와 Install 버튼을 추가한다. /setup/status의 playwright 필드를 읽어 설치 여부를 보여주고, 미설치 시 Install 버튼으로 /setup/playwright/install을 호출한다.

test_requirements.case: Setup page shows Playwright status section
test_requirements.expected: section showing installed/not installed based on setup status

test_requirements.case: Install button calls installPlaywright and shows loading
test_requirements.expected: button disabled during install with loading text

test_requirements.case: After install success, status refreshes to show installed
test_requirements.expected: refetch setup status after install completes

constraints: Playwright section appears in the Tools section of setup page
Install button should warn user it may take a few minutes
Do not add new npm dependencies
